en: You are getting this category because you selected ISO 29001:2020 in the Avetta PQF - ISO Certifications Questionnaire\n\nISO Certificates issued for the a prior standard that are still valid and not expired will be accepted. If your organization also has a country specific certificate that is equivalent to the ISO Standard listed below, that certification will also be accepted as long as it is still valid.
ISO 29001 - Petroleum, Petrochemical and Natural Gas Industries

Please upload your ISO 29001:2020 - Petroleum, Petrochemical and Natural Gas Industries — Sector-Specific Quality Management Systems — Requirements for Product and Service Supply Organizations certificate:
Please enter the certificate expiration date:\n
